references.label: NHS App web integration guidance
references.appliedRule: Embedded surfaces must expect host constraints and avoid unsupported browser assumptions.

references.label: NHS App Javascript API v2
references.appliedRule: Native app navigation and browser overlays remain host-owned, so route wrappers do not add custom browser handoff behavior.

references.label: NHS accessibility content guidance
references.appliedRule: Route headings, labels, and control names remain meaningful and route-owned.

references.label: WCAG 2.4.11 Focus Not Obscured
references.appliedRule: Sticky action reserves are measured so focused controls remain visible.

references.label: WCAG 2.5.8 Target Size Minimum
references.appliedRule: Controls use a local 44px target while keeping the WCAG 24px floor explicit.

references.label: WCAG 2.4.13 Focus Appearance
references.appliedRule: Focus indicators use a high contrast two-ring style.

references.label: Playwright ARIA snapshots
references.appliedRule: Route semantics are captured through Playwright snapshots.

references.label: Playwright emulation
references.appliedRule: Viewport and reduced-motion behavior are verified through browser context emulation.

references.label: Linear UI redesign
references.appliedRule: The wrapper avoids visual chrome and keeps operational UI density intact.
